learned: Studied Telegram plugin as reference. Understood ChannelPlugin interface: id, meta, capabilities, config, outbound (send), status (poll), security, pairing. Created reference doc with code examples for implementing clawish L2 channel.
notes: 5:00 AM. Deep dive into OpenClaw plugin system. Now have clear path to implement clawish channel: outbound.send → POST to L2, status.poll → GET from L2. Ready to code when Allan wakes.
